title: Oakspire Data
description: Balance adjustments and subtle refinements to enhance consistency and gameplay
body:
Oakspire Data is a balance-focused patch designed to refine gameplay. It introduces subtle but meaningful changes to improve consistency, challenge, and overall player experience.

![f](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a9e68ddd292b56f4c9af67bc8ae08d5e10f68f2.png)

🔧 Key Adjustments:


Mob Tweaks:

Adjusted health, damage, and behavior of select hostile and passive mobs.
Improved spawn conditions to reduce overcrowding or imbalance in key biomes.

Item Rebalancing:

Modified stats for certain weapons, tools, and armor to better align with progression.
Adjusted crafting recipes for smoother integration with other Oakspire modules.

Compatibility Touches:

Minor fixes
